title: Limitless options
description: This mod removes the Minecraft bug fix MC-51418.
body:
In the normal configuration you can go up to the highest settings. In the text file you are able to put the settings higher. But the limits will be put down back again. To prevent the resent you can use the "Limitless options".

Limitless options allow to set options values out of the range. For example a Gamma from 2000%. If you set an value out of the range, it may can brake something, please be careful.

You can do this via the "options.txt". This file is anther ~/.minecraft/options.txt

The mod provide a in game option setter. You can disable the button in the config file. This feature is sill very new and not complied jet. In the version 12 it only support Int, double, boolean. Support for enum will bee added in the future.

!["Set Options" button in the top right corner of the screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/grsPHw4u/images/a7c8da8a70794cd0a5157576d9d4bbf11976e6f8.png)![A menu to set the values for options individually.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/grsPHw4u/images/f0eae3d3c4e1b45d49a898348124798b9f28293b.png)

Known issues:

- The performance boost features breaks when render distance fix is switched on.

Notice:

- Cunks over 35 will not update for performance improvement(+~120 fps, - 40 mspt). Only for versions higher than version 4 inclusive.
- Add optional slider out of range fix. Can enable and disable in the config fie. Only for versions higher than version 7 inclusive.
- Add render distance fix (pre pre pre alpha and may can break the chunk loaden). Can enable and disable in the config fie. Only for versions higher than version 8 inclusive.
